EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of call back, which was missed.
EmailTemplate.name: Call No Answer
EmailTemplate.subject: Missed Callback
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
I have tried to call back, as requested, but haven't been able to reach you.
Please let me know if there is a good time to try again or alternatively, you can contact me directly on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
